prompt: Create a realistic vertical portrait photo of a young adult woman lying on her side in bed at night, half tucked against a large white pillow, wearing a simple beige ribbed tank top or sleep camisole. She has dark brown hair falling loosely around her shoulders, with one hand resting near her cheek and the other arm bent across the pillow in a sleepy, intimate pose. Her face should be deliberately covered by a solid opaque rectangular censor block in warm medium brown, centered over the face. The room is dim and cozy, lit by one visible warm bedside lamp on the right edge of the frame, casting soft golden light across white bedding and gentle shadows on dark curtains in the background. Use shallow depth of field, natural skin texture, soft low-light photography, warm cinematic tones, a quiet bedtime mood, vertical 2:3 composition, close framing from upper torso to pillow, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
